quote: I found this app to be good for anyone struggling to track their AI costs. It is a helpful tool for managing both subscriptions and usage-based expenses in one place. Overall, it is a good startup that addresses our expenditures.
author: Lokesh Mawar

quote: Spendwise AI is a perfect example of solving a modern problem with a clean, low-friction UX. The way it identifies 'Zombie Seats' is something every growing startup needs to stay lean.
author: Vaibhav Tripathi

quote: I built Spendwise AI to solve the 'Subscription Spaghetti' problem. Our mission is to give founders and engineers the data they need to justify every dollar spent on AI tooling.
author: Himanshu Yadav

quote: The 'Wise Engine' logic is incredibly sharp. It's rare to see a student project handle complex financial edge cases with this much accuracy. Highly recommended for any professional team.
author: Deepak Sir
